annotations.scenario: Fix a Flat Tire - Replace a Bike Tube

segments.step_name: Remove dust cap from the wheel
segments.step_description: Remove the dust cap from the valve stem

segments.step_name: Squeeze out any air inside the tube
segments.step_description: Deflate the wheel using a deflating needle, but only press it briefly so the wheel barely deflates.

segments.step_name: Squeeze out any air inside the tube
segments.step_description: Stop and fix it: press the deflating needle properly until the wheel is fully deflated.
Get a tire lever to remove the tube

segments.step_name: Engage a tire lever anywhere on the rim except right at the valve
segments.step_description: Insert the tire lever between the tire and wheel rim

segments.step_name: Pull back and lift the bead out of the rim
segments.step_description: Pry out a section of the tire with the tire lever

segments.step_name: Use the tire lever around the rim until the tube is complete off the wheel
segments.step_description: Run the tire lever around the rim to remove the tire with tube from the wheel rim
Seperate the inner tube from the tire

segments.step_name: Fit the tube to the wheel
segments.step_description: Fit the inner tube into the tire, but leave part of the tube twisted and not fully tucked inside.

segments.step_name: Fit the tube to the wheel
segments.step_description: Stop and fix it: pull the tube back out, untwist it, and fit the inner tube into the tire evenly.

segments.step_name: Fit the tire to the wheel
segments.step_description: Push the tire back into place on the wheel rim

segments.step_name: Engage the valve stem into the rim
segments.step_description: Perform the missed step now: insert the valve stem into the hole on the rim.

segments.step_name: Partially inflate the the tube to check the bead is properly seated
segments.step_description: Inflate the tube to check if the tire bead is properly seated in the rim
Cover the valve stem with the dust cap
